name: Shaurya Select SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Shaurya Select SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Pizza Hut e-gift voucher worth Rs 500 on quarterly spends of Rs 50,000
Yatra or Pantaloons e-gift voucher worth Rs 7,000 on annual spends of Rs 5 lakh
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 1.5 lakh or more in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: First-year fee waived for eligible defence personnel, subject to product terms
1,500 Reward Points on payment of renewal fee
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 on CSD, dining, movies, departmental stores and grocery spends
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 on other eligible non-fuel retail purchases
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year
Personal accident insurance cover of Rs 10 lakh, subject to policy terms
Card can be embossed with service branch such as Army, Navy, Air Force or Paramilitary
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per month

salaried: Designed for eligible defence, paramilitary and related service personnel
